calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2023 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Ihe Onwuka, in propria persona, Plaintiff.

Kenneth M. Trujillo-Jamison, Esq., (213) 955-9240, for Defendant.

RE: DEFENDANT X CORP.'s DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT.

Ruling is ARGUED. At conclusion of argument, the subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Eileen Ahern Esq. 213-955-9240 Willenken LLP for Defendant X Corp.
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. The Court informs the contest email was late. Ms. Ahern requests not to allow the other side to file an amended complaint. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT X CORP., DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant's unopposed "demurrer to amended complaint" is sustained with leave to amend.

Order is signed after the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
